neighborhoods.name: Centro / Malecon
neighborhoods.description: Classic Mexican beach town center with the famous malecon boardwalk, cathedral, and vibrant art scene
neighborhoods.character: Malecon beach town, art scene, traditional charm

housing.predominantType: Condos and apartments near the malecon

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Puerto Vallarta. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Vallarta

neighborhoods.name: Marina Vallarta
neighborhoods.description: Planned marina community with golf course, shops, and protected harbor
neighborhoods.character: Marina resort, golf, planned community, secure

housing.predominantType: Marina condos, townhouses, and golf villas

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Puerto Vallarta's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Vallarta

neighborhoods.name: Pitillal / Ixtapa
neighborhoods.description: Inland neighborhoods with authentic Mexican life, local markets, and significantly lower costs

housing.predominantType: Houses and apartments at local Mexican prices

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Vallarta

neighborhoods.name: Zona Romantica / South Shore
neighborhoods.description: Vibrant, walkable area south of the river with the largest expat community, LGBTQ-friendly, and restaurants
neighborhoods.character: Vibrant expat hub, LGBTQ-friendly, dining capital

housing.predominantType: Condos and apartments in mid-rise buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Vallarta
